definition_en: Used as a greeting
definition_id: Digunakan sebagai sapaan
exampleSentence: Hello, how are you today?

definition_en: Used when leaving someone
definition_id: Digunakan saat berpisah dengan seseorang
exampleSentence: It is late, so goodbye for now!

definition_en: A female parent
definition_id: Orang tua perempuan; ibu
exampleSentence: My mother is a doctor.

definition_en: A male parent
definition_id: Orang tua laki-laki; ayah
exampleSentence: His father works in an office.

definition_en: A place where children go to be educated
definition_id: Tempat di mana anak-anak pergi untuk belajar; sekolah
exampleSentence: I walk to school every morning.

definition_en: A person who teaches
definition_id: Orang yang mengajar; guru
exampleSentence: The teacher is explaining the lesson.
context_id: Profesi orang yang mengajar di kelas.

definition_en: A person who is studying at a school or university
definition_id: Orang yang sedang belajar di sekolah atau universitas; murid/mahasiswa
exampleSentence: He is a good student.
context_id: Sebutan untuk orang yang sedang menuntut ilmu.

definition_en: To put food into your mouth and swallow it
definition_id: Memasukkan makanan ke dalam mulut dan menelannya; makan
exampleSentence: We eat dinner at 7 PM.

definition_en: To take liquid into your mouth and swallow it
definition_id: Memasukkan cairan ke dalam mulut dan menelannya; minum
exampleSentence: I want to drink some water.

definition_en: To rest with your eyes closed
definition_id: Beristirahat dengan mata tertutup; tidur
exampleSentence: I sleep for eight hours every night.

definition_en: A clear liquid that is necessary for life
definition_id: Cairan bening yang diperlukan untuk kehidupan; air
exampleSentence: Can I have a glass of water?

definition_en: A food made from flour, water, and yeast
definition_id: Makanan yang terbuat dari tepung, air, dan ragi; roti
exampleSentence: I like to eat bread for breakfast.

definition_en: A building where people live
definition_id: Bangunan tempat orang tinggal; rumah
exampleSentence: This is my house.

definition_en: A person you know and like
definition_id: Orang yang kamu kenal dan sukai; teman
exampleSentence: She is my best friend.

definition_en: A set of printed pages inside a cover
definition_id: Kumpulan halaman cetak di dalam sampul; buku
exampleSentence: I am reading a good book.

definition_en: A tool used for writing with ink
definition_id: Alat yang digunakan untuk menulis dengan tinta; pulpen
exampleSentence: Do you have a pen?

definition_en: A piece of furniture with a flat top and legs
definition_id: Mebel dengan permukaan datar dan kaki-kaki; meja
exampleSentence: Put the keys on the table.

definition_en: A piece of furniture for one person to sit on
definition_id: Mebel untuk duduk satu orang; kursi
exampleSentence: Please sit in that chair.

definition_en: A round fruit with red or green skin
definition_id: Buah bulat dengan kulit merah atau hijau; apel
exampleSentence: I eat an apple every day.

definition_en: A vehicle with four wheels
definition_id: Kendaraan dengan empat roda; mobil
exampleSentence: My father drives a blue car.

definition_en: A large vehicle that carries many people
definition_id: Kendaraan besar yang mengangkut banyak orang; bus
exampleSentence: I go to work by bus.

definition_en: The early part of the day
definition_id: Bagian awal dari hari; pagi
exampleSentence: I wake up early in the morning.

definition_en: The time when it is dark and people sleep
definition_id: Waktu saat gelap dan orang tidur; malam
exampleSentence: Good night, see you tomorrow.

definition_en: The star that provides light and heat to Earth
definition_id: Bintang yang memberikan cahaya dan panas ke Bumi; matahari
exampleSentence: The sun is very bright today.

definition_en: The large round object that circles the Earth at night
definition_id: Benda bulat besar yang mengelilingi Bumi di malam hari; bulan
exampleSentence: Look at the beautiful moon!

definition_en: A large and important town
definition_id: Kota besar dan penting; kota
exampleSentence: New York is a big city.
context_id: Wilayah dengan banyak gedung dan penduduk.

definition_en: Feeling or showing pleasure
definition_id: Merasa atau menunjukkan kesenangan; senang/bahagia
exampleSentence: I am so happy to see you.

definition_en: Feeling or showing sorrow
definition_id: Merasa atau menunjukkan kesedihan; sedih
exampleSentence: The movie was very sad.

definition_en: Large in size
definition_id: Berukuran besar; besar
exampleSentence: Elephant is a big animal.

definition_en: Not large in size
definition_id: Tidak besar; kecil
exampleSentence: The mouse is very small.
